parameters.name: description
parameters.value:
={{ 'System health check at ' + $json.timestamp + '

Overall: ' + ($json.healthy ? 'HEALTHY' : 'DEGRADED') + '

Alerts:
' + $json.alerts.map(a => '- [' + a.severity.toUpperCase() + '] ' + a.source + ': ' + a.message).join('
') + '

Checks:
' + $json.checks.map(c => '- ' + c.name + ': ' + c.status + ' — ' + c.detail).join('
') }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: $json.success, workflow: $json.workflow, kind: $json.kind, status: $json.status, receivedAt: $json.receivedAt, result: typeof $json.result === 'string' ? JSON.parse($json.result) : $json.result }) }}
